basis: Open, citable data authorities for external-market valuation. Independence is counted by AUTHORITY (not source id); the £ point is anchored ONLY by recorded PRICE comps; indices CORROBORATE (kind :index) but never vote the level. ToS-restricted sources contribute derived-only (G4). Inalienable Land Trust holdings are out of scope entirely (G5; ADR-2605192245).
notes: DRAFT. Reliability priors are cold-start; the kenchi_flywheel cell recalibrates them against realized sales. Do NOT treat as authoritative until status flips to 'attested' with ≥3 Council Lv6+ DIDs.
G8 open-data-first: every authority below is open data or used derived-only. No closed AVM.
G3 publish gate: ≥3 independent recorded comps AND ≥2 independent authorities AND a fresh anchor.
